# Minesweeper Project

A web-based Minesweeper game built using React, Vite, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. The engine focuses on performance, precise state-tracking adjustments, and layout patterns optimized for various device sizes.

## Core Features

- **First-Click Safety Check:** Ensures the initial revealed block never contains a mine by lazily generating mine positions upon user interaction.
- **Move History Tracking:** Maintains an array stack of historical board configurations up to 10 moves deep to power instantaneous state rollbacks.
- **Customization Controls:** Variable difficulty options allowing selection between 5 and 20 global mines per layout session.
